horoscope: Getting your domestic or personal life can often be in focus as you begin July, dear Aries. New initiatives surrounding home and property might be better saved for another time, but reworking and refining works in progress can be fruitful. In general, it’s a time to slow down, review, and collect yourself. Circumstances may be such that you want to reconnect with family members and old places and situations that you hold dear. If home life is unsettled, this can be a time to rethink living arrangements and conditions and find new ways to reorder your life from the ground up. Still, your desire to break free and try new things and ways of expressing yourself is growing, and you may be considering ways to manage insecurities and concerns about resources that could be in the way. Good energy is with you later today as you focus on some of the dreams and hopes dearest to your heart, and possibly share them with people you care about.

Decision-making is not as straightforward as it typically is these days, dear Taurus, as you search within for answers and need more time to draw conclusions. It’s a strong time for reviewing projects and plans, however. Try to fix rather than dwell on flaws and problems, and Mercury's retrograde can be a rewarding period for revisiting past projects or studies. Exercise greater care and attentiveness with new financial initiatives, emails, texts, and phone calls, as well as when communicating with neighbors and siblings. Your desire for comfort and domesticity is also building. At this time, you might see where unhealthy attitudes may get in the way of your chance to move forward and take advantage of opportunities to grow and improve. As today advances, you can become quite comfortable with your performance, possibly even to the point of self-satisfaction. It's a good time to connect with your goals and ambitions.

Some reviewing and editing may be necessary before moving forward these days, dear Gemini, particularly with finances. While there can be some communication breakdowns, you’re learning a lot about what you truly want and need. You're also challenged to re-evaluate and prioritize your goals. You might learn that freeing yourself from certain burdensome problems you’ve kept to yourself can be liberating, but be selective regarding who you share with. You might also be dealing with insecurities holding you back from saying what you feel and going after what you truly want. These need to be handled on your mission to express yourself more freely and joyfully. Fiery Mars continues to light a fire under you as you seek out more excitement and opportunities to improve and grow, and later today, you're harnessing some of this positive, motivated energy.

With Mercury retrograde in your sign, dear Cancer, in the weeks ahead, there can be more than the usual delays, misunderstandings, or lack of clarity on a significant matter, keeping you in limbo. You might take a little extra time to make sure you’re clear in your communication. It’s a time of a little more introspection, and you will benefit greatly from this. Decision-making is not quite straightforward, encouraging you to look more deeply within for answers and take more time to think things through. You might also deal with tricky matters of respect or ownership right now. You have a strong need to unwind, simplify, and enjoy yourself, but insecurities or concerns on a social level could keep you on your toes. If you're overdoing or keeping tabs on your networks, consider whether this is causing you too much tension. Stepping back a little could help you. Later today, good energies are with you for finding a balance between attending to your need to be of practical use and your need for some form of emotional retreat into yourself.

You might be playing a waiting game in a key area of your life these days, dear Leo, with Mercury retrograde in your solar twelfth house. You could wrestle with whether to leave a situation behind, for example. It’s a good cycle for redoing and refining work that is already underway, for journaling, and for backtracking over the past to find answers that you previously overlooked. Mercury will remain retrograde until July 23rd, making it a generally good time to research, reflect, and redo. Still, your enthusiasm for self-discovery is growing with Jupiter now in your sign and, at times, it can be undeniable! Managing your goals and ambitions may be necessary, especially if insecurities or worries are brewing, to make the most of this transit. As today advances, you're tuning in to your need for harmony in your relationships.

July should be an interesting month for you, dear Virgo, with a focus on your happiness goals. Still, with your ruler, Mercury, retrograde until the 23rd, watch for missing information or fuzzy thinking. If delays occur, consider that they might help you catch up with how you feel about a matter. At the same time, a lot is going on inside and in your dreaming world, and hunches are powerful and hard to ignore. Feelings, memories, and strong intuition can totally change your outlook and push you onto an entirely new path with Jupiter now in your solar twelfth house. Avoid taking on too many activities so that you can explore this theme. As today advances, you're emotionally geared to support and help the people around you.

There's a strong focus on your career and reputation sector these days, dear Libra. Mercury's retrograde in this area of your solar chart until the 23rd does prompt a need for review and limbo or delays to contend with regarding your longer-range goals or business. You’re in good shape to refine projects already underway or return to old ones. Consider that communications may not be exactly right at this time, and adjust accordingly. Some plans drawn up during this shift may never come to pass, for example. At the same time, your attention to your happiness goals and social life is growing. Today's energies remind you to manage insecurities that may be holding you back from pursuing these things more wholeheartedly. As the day advances, you're focusing on the similarities between you and the people in your life, while being entertained by the differences.

With Mercury retrograde until the 23rd, dear Scorpio, there can be up-in-the-air issues surrounding higher education, publishing, or transportation. However, the weeks ahead are good for studying, reviewing, reflecting, redoing, or revising. It’s not an ideal time for pushing forward, but it’s a fine cycle for renewed interest in past endeavors. You have a strong interest in broadening your mental experiences these days, in general, even if it isn't always straightforward to get to where you want to go. At the same time, your larger goals and ambitions are stirring. Your relationship goals and career or life path goals may not be meshing well just for now, but seeking a compromise can be worthwhile. Consciously aim to tone things down and watch for overreaching for the best results. As today advances, this comes more readily. Your mood is boosted by comforting and familiar activities, in fact.

With Mercury now retrograde until the 23rd, dear Sagittarius, prepare for possible misunderstandings or missing information that delays you. However, consider that this can be a blessing in disguise, acting to redirect you. During this retrograde cycle, you’re in good shape to review, budget, and get a different perspective on your intimate relationships, support systems, dependencies, and personal psychology. It’s preferable to give yourself and others some space while also communicating your interest. Another building theme in your life is about exploring special interests, topics, and new activities. Handling issues in your daily routine may be wise if they're preventing you from discovering new ideas and possibilities. While there can be some distractions today, gathering information can be fun and rewarding.

With Mercury's retrograde cycle until July 23rd, dear Capricorn, you’re likely to learn new things about past problems, mainly related to relationships, work, and health. Seeing where you may have been tripping up or chasing the wrong things in the past can lead to better decisions later. It’s best not to take for granted that others will understand you. There may be a stronger focus on the past, or you could be dealing with delays that keep you guessing. New information might come to you, leading you to view a partnership or past matter in a new light. Try not to focus on the words chosen to express ideas now, but rather on the intention behind them. With the Moon's move into your resources sector later today, it can make sense to slow things down a little or ease off overthinking things. Grounding, earthy, comforting, and familiar activities are the best for you now.

With Mercury retrograde until July 23rd, dear Aquarius, you may be dealing with the need to rework old systems and projects. Old problems with work, chores, or daily affairs can resurface. Mercury retrograde cycles can be likened somewhat to a mission to clean or reorganize a messy closet. Initially, the process seems to bring more chaos than order, but eventually, you sort things out, and you’re better off for it! At the same time, counseling, advice, or other one-to-one connections are building themes in your life. You may be dealing with problems in balancing attention to family and your other relationships. Aim to tackle insecurities that may be restricting growth in relationships. It’s a time to listen to your heart and decide what changes are suitable for you. The Moon moves into your sign later today, and you can be pulling out of yourself and feeling more interactive.

Mercury’s retrograde lasts until July 23rd, dear Pisces, and in the weeks ahead, there can be some delays or backtracking to manage, most prominent with romance or creativity. You might also get the chance to arrive at a different perspective. It’s a good time to revisit old creative projects or ideas that you didn’t have time to pursue or complete. Keep in mind that your communications may not always be taken in the way you intend. However, consider that what appears to be stagnation might only be about review and catching up. Allow yourself extra personal space to gather your thoughts. Also consider that if an overly hectic or chaotic schedule is now taking its toll, it may be time to reassess demanding work or projects to take better care of yourself.
